---
title: Glossary
subtitle: Controlled vocabulary for behavioral data terms and BDM concepts
toc: false
listing:
  template: "../assets/templates/glossary.ejs"
  field-required: [name, categories, description]
  filter-ui: [name, categories]
  sort-ui: false
  categories: numbered
  page-size: 10000
  contents:
    - "glossary.yml"
---

*This glossary is generated from the published [behaverse/schemas](https://behaverse.org/schemas) artifacts: cross-cutting terms from the [vocabulary](https://behaverse.org/schemas/vocabulary/terms.jsonld), plus the field terms each schema defines.*
